# Nithyanantha | Portfolio

A high-end, luxury creative portfolio website.

## Tech Stack
- React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS 4, Framer Motion (Motion).
- Custom liquid-glass design system.

## Key Features
- Interactive Projects Grid with custom video player.
- Scroll-triggered vertical experience timeline.
- Physics-based bouncy animations and 3D tilt effects.
- Clean, minimalist "Dark Luxury" aesthetic.

## Deployment
- GitHub Pages: https://nimalanrao.github.io/Portfolio-Final/
- Repository: https://github.com/nimalanrao/Portfolio-Final
